head: 96c9042
blocked_scope: CUDA or MLX training process execution
DB schema, migration, or model changes
benchmark, package, export, or playground runtime changes
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M3-000 is pushed. This scope implements M3-001 train job preflight, ModelRun/Job/JobResource transaction creation, and model-run read/list API without touching training runtime wrappers.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. ./.venv/bin/python -m py_compile services/api/app/main.py services/api/app/routes/jobs.py services/api/app/routes/model_runs.py services/api/app/schemas/job.py services/api/app/schemas/training.py services/api/app/services/training_service.py services/shared/db/repositories/training_store.py tests/training/test_training_preflight.py

phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-001 only: train JobSubmitRequest preflight, approved dataset and hardware backend guard, strict base_model catalog guard, route snapshot consistency, atomic ModelRun+Job+JobResource creation, and model-run read/list APIs.
phase_notes.audit: Read M3 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M3-001 Done/transaction notes, ARCHITECTURE ModelRun/JobResource invariants, existing job route/dataset/hardware services, and model catalog/cache boundaries.
phase_notes.build: In progress: add training DTOs, store/service, route wiring, and focused training preflight tests.
phase_notes.check: Pending: task JSON, py_compile, focused pytest, OpenAPI export, import boundary, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Pending: update WORKING closeout, commit, and push after verification passes.

pabcd.approved_scope: M3-001 train preflight API/service/store/tests within listed paths.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No CUDA/MLX runtime execution, worker training wrappers, checkpoint/resume, job control, DB schema/model/migration, benchmark, package, export, playground, or docs/spec/foundation/mockup/handoff/review edits.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
